purpose: L5 constraint: operator algebra is exactly su(2). Classify 48 L4 survivors by su(2) dependency.

L5_constraint.why_not_larger: dim(su(d)) = d^2-1. d=2 => dim=3. su(3) needs 8 generators, cannot fit in 2x2 matrices.

test_a_generator_count.conclusion: su(2) has exactly 3 generators. No more fit in d=2.

test_b_casimir.conclusion: Casimir C = 3/4 * I confirmed for spin-1/2.

test_c_killing_form.method: sympy exact computation from structure constants
test_c_killing_form.conclusion: K = -2*delta confirmed. su(2) is compact (negative definite Killing form).

test_d_commutation.conclusion: All su(2) commutation relations verified exactly.

z_dephasing.reason: Kraus ops are proportional to I and sigma_z (su(2) generator)

x_dephasing.reason: Kraus ops are proportional to I and sigma_x (su(2) generator)

bit_flip.reason: Kraus ops proportional to I and sigma_x

phase_flip.reason: Kraus ops proportional to I and sigma_z

bit_phase_flip.reason: Kraus ops proportional to I and sigma_y

depolarizing.reason: Kraus ops proportional to I, sigma_x, sigma_y, sigma_z -- ALL su(2) generators

amplitude_damping.reason: Kraus ops are NOT proportional to single Pauli. Works at d=2 but structure is NOT inherently su(2). Generalizes to any d without su(2).

phase_damping.reason: Kraus ops mix I and sz but K1 involves off-diagonal structure. Works at d=2 but not inherently su(2)-specific.

unitary_rotation.reason: U = exp(-i*theta*n.sigma/2) is generated by su(2). Rotation group SO(3) ~ SU(2)/Z2. Fundamentally su(2).

z_measurement.reason: Projection onto sz eigenstates. Basis defined by su(2) generator.

test_e_channel_su2.conclusion: Pauli channels (z/x-deph, bit/phase/bit-phase flip, depol, rotation, z-meas) REQUIRE su(2). Amplitude/phase damping work generically.

density_matrix.reason: Density matrices exist for any d, any algebra. Not su(2)-specific.

bloch_vector.reason: Bloch SPHERE is specific to d=2. rho = (I + r.sigma)/2 uses Pauli basis. At d>2, the generalized Bloch vector lives in R^(d^2-1), not a sphere.
bloch_vector.su2_role: structural -- parameterization uses su(2) generators as basis

stokes_parameters.reason: Stokes parameters S_i = Tr(rho * sigma_i) project onto Pauli basis. The Poincare sphere IS the Bloch sphere for polarization.

eigenvalue_decomposition.reason: Eigendecomposition works for any Hermitian matrix, any d.

wigner_function.reason: Wigner function exists for any d (discrete Wigner for qudits), but at d=2 has special structure: maps to Bloch sphere phase space.
wigner_function.su2_role: enhanced -- d=2 Wigner has unique negativity properties

husimi_q.reason: Husimi Q exists for any d via coherent states, but at d=2 the coherent states are SU(2) coherent states on the sphere.
husimi_q.su2_role: enhanced -- SU(2) coherent states give sphere parameterization

coherence_vector.reason: Coherence vector = generalized Bloch vector in su(d) basis. At d=2, this IS the Bloch vector in su(2) basis. The 3-component form is su(2)-specific.

purification.reason: Purification works for any d. Not algebra-specific.

characteristic_function.reason: Characteristic function is generic but at d=2, the displacement operators use su(2) structure for simple closed forms.

relative_entropy.reason: S(rho||sigma) = Tr(rho log rho - rho log sigma). Works for any d, no algebra structure needed.

mutual_information.reason: I(A:B) = S(A) + S(B) - S(AB). Pure information-theoretic. No algebra dependency.

fubini_study.reason: Fubini-Study metric on projective Hilbert space. Works for any d.

bures_distance.reason: Bures distance works for any d, but at d=2 has closed form: D_B = sqrt(2(1 - sqrt(F))). Fidelity F has exact closed form at d=2.

hs_distance.reason: Hilbert-Schmidt distance = sqrt(Tr((A-B)^2)). Works for any d.

trace_distance.reason: Trace distance = (1/2)||A-B||_1. Works for any d.

z_dephasing.reason: Dephasing in Z basis. Z = sigma_z is an su(2) generator. The channel is defined by this specific generator.
z_dephasing.su2_role: structural -- Kraus ops use su(2) generator sigma_z

x_dephasing.reason: Dephasing in X basis. X = sigma_x is an su(2) generator.
x_dephasing.su2_role: structural -- Kraus ops use su(2) generator sigma_x

depolarizing.reason: Depolarizing channel at d=2 uses ALL three Pauli operators as Kraus ops. rho -> (1-p)*rho + p/3*(sx*rho*sx + sy*rho*sy + sz*rho*sz). Generic depolarizing exists at any d, but the d=2 form uses su(2) basis.
depolarizing.su2_role: structural -- uses complete su(2) generator set
depolarizing.note: At d>2, depolarizing uses su(d) generators, not su(2).

amplitude_damping.reason: Amplitude damping models energy relaxation. Kraus ops are NOT Pauli operators. Generalizes to any d (generalized amplitude damping).
amplitude_damping.su2_role: none -- works at d=2 but not because of su(2)

phase_damping.reason: Phase damping = T2 process. Generic decoherence, not su(2)-specific. Generalizes to any d.

bit_flip.reason: Bit flip uses sigma_x as Kraus operator. su(2) generator.
bit_flip.su2_role: structural -- Kraus op is su(2) generator

phase_flip.reason: Phase flip uses sigma_z as Kraus operator. su(2) generator.
phase_flip.su2_role: structural -- Kraus op is su(2) generator

bit_phase_flip.reason: Bit-phase flip uses sigma_y as Kraus operator. su(2) generator.
bit_phase_flip.su2_role: structural -- Kraus op is su(2) generator

unitary_rotation.reason: U = exp(-i*theta*n.sigma/2) is generated by su(2). Rotation group SU(2) acts on d=2 Hilbert space. At d>2, rotations require su(d).
unitary_rotation.su2_role: fundamental -- IS an su(2) group element

z_measurement.reason: Measurement in sigma_z eigenbasis. Defined by su(2) generator.
z_measurement.su2_role: structural -- measurement basis from su(2) generator

mutual_information_corr.reason: Mutual information for correlations. Information-theoretic, no algebra needed.

quantum_discord.reason: Discord requires optimization over measurements. At d=2, the optimal measurement is always a von Neumann measurement in some su(2) direction. Closed-form exists for X-states at d=2. No closed form at d>2.
quantum_discord.su2_role: enhanced -- optimization simplifies to Bloch sphere direction

CNOT.reason: CNOT = |0><0| x I + |1><1| x X. Uses computational basis (sz eigenstates) and sigma_x. Inherently su(2) x su(2) structure.
CNOT.su2_role: structural -- built from su(2) eigenstates and generators

CZ.reason: CZ = |0><0| x I + |1><1| x Z. Uses sz eigenstates and sigma_z.

SWAP.reason: SWAP exists for any d (permutation of tensor factors). At d=2: SWAP = (I + sx x sx + sy x sy + sz x sz)/2, which decomposes into su(2) generators.
SWAP.su2_role: enhanced -- su(2) decomposition gives closed form

Hadamard.reason: H = (sx + sz)/sqrt(2). Linear combination of su(2) generators. Maps between su(2) eigenbases.
Hadamard.su2_role: structural -- IS an su(2) rotation (pi about (x+z)/sqrt(2) axis)

T_gate.reason: T = diag(1, e^(i*pi/4)). Diagonal in sz eigenbasis. Generated by sz (su(2) generator).
T_gate.su2_role: structural -- generated by su(2) Cartan element

iSWAP.reason: iSWAP = exp(i*pi/4*(sx x sx + sy x sy)). Built from su(2) generators.

schmidt.reason: Schmidt decomposition works for any bipartite state, any d. It is an SVD of the coefficient matrix.

svd.reason: SVD is linear algebra. Works for any matrix, any d.

spectral.reason: Spectral decomposition works for any normal matrix, any d.

pauli_decomposition.reason: Decomposes operator in Pauli basis {I, sx, sy, sz}. This IS the su(2) + u(1) basis. At d>2, need su(d) generators.
pauli_decomposition.su2_role: fundamental -- the decomposition IS into su(2) generators

cartan_kak.reason: KAK decomposition: U = (K1 x K2) * exp(i*sum a_i*si x si) * (K3 x K4). Uses su(2) x su(2) subalgebra of su(4). Fundamentally su(2).
cartan_kak.su2_role: fundamental -- decomposition into su(2) group elements

l1_coherence.reason: l1 coherence = sum of off-diagonal |rho_ij|. Basis-dependent. At d=2, the preferred basis is an su(2) eigenbasis (usually sz).
l1_coherence.su2_role: structural -- reference basis is su(2) eigenbasis
l1_coherence.note: Coherence is basis-dependent; at d=2 the basis IS defined by su(2).

relative_entropy_coherence.reason: C_re = S(diag(rho)) - S(rho). Basis-dependent. Same as l1: reference basis from su(2) eigenstates.

wigner_negativity.reason: Wigner negativity as nonclassicality measure exists for any d, but at d=2 the discrete Wigner function has special structure tied to MUBs which are su(2) rotations of each other.
wigner_negativity.su2_role: enhanced -- MUB structure at d=2 from su(2)

hopf_invariant.reason: Hopf fibration S3 -> S2 is the SU(2) bundle over CP1. The Hopf invariant classifies maps S3 -> S2. Fundamentally su(2) / SU(2).
hopf_invariant.su2_role: fundamental -- Hopf fibration IS the SU(2) principal bundle

hopf_connection.reason: Connection on the Hopf bundle S3 -> S2. IS the canonical SU(2) connection.

chirality_operator_C.reason: Chirality at d=2 is gamma_5 = sx*sy*sz (product of Pauli generators). Defined by su(2) structure.

chiral_overlap.reason: Overlap with chirality eigenstates. Chirality operator defined by su(2).

chiral_current.reason: Chiral current j5 involves chirality operator and su(2) generators.

berry_holonomy_operator.reason: Holonomy around loops in parameter space. At d=2, the holonomy group is U(1) (Abelian Berry phase) because the fiber is S1 in the Hopf bundle. The underlying structure is SU(2).
berry_holonomy_operator.su2_role: structural -- holonomy of SU(2) principal bundle

chirality_bipartition_marker.reason: Marks bipartition by chirality. Chirality defined by su(2).

test_g_no_larger_algebra.test: No larger algebra acts faithfully at d=2
test_g_no_larger_algebra.conclusion: Neither su(3) nor su(4) can act faithfully on d=2. su(2) is the UNIQUE full algebra. No legos killed by needing larger algebra.

test_h_pauli_completeness.conclusion: Pauli basis is complete and orthogonal. su(2) + u(1) spans all of M(2,C).

relative_entropy.reason: S(rho||sigma) = Tr(rho(log rho - log sigma)). Defined for any density matrices, any d. No algebra needed.

mutual_information.reason: I(A:B) = S(A) + S(B) - S(AB). Information-theoretic quantity. No algebra structure needed.

test_i_entropy_su2.conclusion: Both surviving entropy measures are GENERIC (algebra-independent). The su(2)-specific entropies (von Neumann, etc.) were already killed at L4.

summary.headline: L5 complete. su(2) is the FULL and ONLY algebra at d=2. 0 legos killed (all 48 are COMPATIBLE with su(2)). Classification: A(requires)=27, B(generic)=14, D(enhanced)=7. No legos need larger algebra (C=0) -- confirmed by z3.
